name: Lima Mustard Linguini
recipeIngredient: 6 ripe plum tomatoes, seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the linguini in a large pot of boiling water until al dente. Drain in a colander.
2. While the linguini is cooking, bring vegetable broth to a boil.
3. Add lima beans, scallions, and mustard to the boiling vegetable stock. Continue to boil for 7 minutes.
4. Add tomato slices and turn off heat.
5. Toss the cooked linguini in the broth.
6. Serve.
